---
id: listar-conversaciones-del-proyecto
title: "List Project Conversations"
description: "List project conversations with filters by date range, search, feedback, metadata, or user."
sidebar_label: "List Project Conversations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/ai-findr-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Project Conversations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/private/projects/{projectId}/conversations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List project conversations with filters by date range, search, feedback, metadata, or user. It returns paginated results with the first user message, metadata, tags, and latest evaluation.

**When to use it:**
This endpoint connects the aggregated summary with the concrete case. After detecting a suspicious period or anomaly in the metrics, use it to locate the relevant conversations and then open one in detail.

**Important restriction:**
- `metadata` is mutually exclusive with `search` and `voteType`

**Required headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer {api_key}`
- `X-Organization-Id`

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Project identifier","in":"path","name":"projectId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Filter start date in YYYY-MM-DD format","in":"query","name":"startDate","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Filter end date in YYYY-MM-DD format","in":"query","name":"endDate","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Page number","in":"query","name":"page","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"description":"Items per page","in":"query","name":"perPage","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"description":"Full-text search within messages","in":"query","name":"search","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Feedback vote filter (`up` or `down`)","in":"query","name":"voteType","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Text search on serialized metadata","in":"query","name":"metadata","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"description":"Filter conversations associated with a specific user","in":"query","name":"userId","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
